title: Design system playground
description: Every reusable primitive, in every state. Use this to iterate on the visual language before applying it to real pages.

i18n.description: Locale-aware formatting and translated domain vocabulary. Switch language above to see everything update in place.
i18n.longLabelNote: The longest Turkish navigation and status labels, to check wrapping and truncation.
i18n.demoSourceNote: Fictional example record used only to demonstrate the component.

demo.cardDescription: A short description of what this card contains.
demo.cardContent: Card content sits here, at body size.
demo.sectionHeaderDescription: Used to group related content inside a page
demo.tooltipText: Exports a JSON file to your device

blurbs.foundations: Surfaces, accent and status tokens. Every swatch is a live CSS variable — it follows the theme.
blurbs.typography: Inter Variable, self-hosted. Each size carries its own line-height, tracking and weight.
blurbs.buttons: Focus rings come from the global :focus-visible rule — tab through these to check consistency.
blurbs.badges: StatusBadge is the token-driven one — prefer it for anything that carries state.
blurbs.forms: Field wires label, description and error to the control. Inspect the DOM to confirm aria-describedby and aria-invalid.
blurbs.feedback: Alerts, progress and loading. Tints are low chroma — a change in paper stock, not a colored box.
blurbs.data: Metrics, tables and label/value pairs. Numbers use tabular figures so columns align.
blurbs.overlays: Dialog, tooltip and accordion. Check focus trapping and escape handling here.
blurbs.composition: How the page-level pieces sit together. This is the rhythm every page should inherit.
